reference: Hello Doctor, I broke my heel three days ago. The specialist said it is the worst type of break to get. My question is, should I keep the special boot on even with the fracture blisters? It is painful as it rubs against the boot. Should I keep it on at night as well?
text: Hello doctor, I broke my heel three days ago; the specialist said it is the worst type of hurt to get. My question is: should I keep the special boot on even with the fracture blister? It is painful as it rubs against the boot, so I keep it on at night as well.
